message:
🌱 New Crowdin translations for cards and common strings (#1241)

Add new i18n keys across 8 locales (zh, pt, ja, it, hi, fr, es, de):
- cards.json: reportIssue
- common.json: skipToContent, installConsole, exitDemoMode

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

files.patch:
